facebook.caption: 4.8 stars. 2,421 reviews. Right on the beach at Ông Lang. Camia Restaurant keeps showing up for a reason. Fewer crowds than the south end of the island, tables practically on the sand, and a rating that holds across thousands of real visits. If you're staying near Ông Lang, this is your dinner. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Waves behind you, food in front of you. Camia Restaurant at Ông Lang beach is pulling 4.8 stars from 2,421 reviews and the tables are right on the sand. Worth every step off the main strip.
